message:
refactor(abi): migrate 7 more libc::syscall calls in unistd_abi.rs

Part of bd-h5x EPIC: remove glibc callthrough.

Migrated syscalls:
- readlink/readlinkat -> syscall::sys_readlinkat
- open/openat -> syscall::sys_openat
- unlink/rmdir/unlinkat -> syscall::sys_unlinkat

Progress: 351 → 344 libc::syscall calls in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
